guide.title: Welcome to Hotel Price Comparison Platform
guide.intro: This is a simple guide that will help you understand how to use our platform.

steps.0: Enter the city or hotel name you want to visit here, and we will provide you with relevant search suggestions.
steps.1: Click here to select your check-in and check-out dates, and we will recommend suitable hotels based on the dates.
steps.2: Click here to set the number of guests and rooms, including options for adults, children, and pets.
steps.3: You can click on the popular destinations here to start searching quickly, or directly enter the place you want to go.
steps.4: Browse the hotel list, view hotel prices, ratings, and detailed information, and select the hotel you like.
steps.5: After selecting multiple hotels, click here to compare their prices and facilities to help you make the best choice.
steps.6: Log in or register an account to save your search history and favorite hotels, and get personalized recommendations.
